steps.title: Evaluate the function at the starting year
steps.content:
Since $x$ represents years after 2008, setting $x = 0$ gives the population in 2008. When $x = 0$:
$$f(0) = 3,000(0.75)^0 = 3,000 \cdot 1 = 3,000$$
The constant 3,000 is what the function outputs when $x = 0$.

steps.title: Identify what 3,000 represents
steps.content: In an exponential function of the form $f(x) = a \cdot b^x$, the constant $a$ is always the initial value—the output when the input is 0. Here, 3,000 is the population when $x = 0$ (the year 2008), making it the initial population. That matches choice D — D is correct.
